untranslatable_reason: Calendar-based entry/exit conditions (first day of November, last day of April) cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. The allowed operators are comparison (>, <, >=, <=, ==) and technical crosses (crosses_above, crosses_below) plus regime check (is), but none support calendar date matching. This is a seasonal/calendar strategy that requires date-based logic outside the indicator framework.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_10 is a classic seasonal pattern (Buy in November, sell in April). While the holding period (6 months) and direction (LONG) are clear, the entry and exit conditions are date-based calendar rules rather than price/indicator-based rules. The backtest engine would need explicit calendar date support or a separate date-matching operator to implement this strategy.
